name: Mustangs FC
overview: A goal kicking comedy drama about girls who are abandoning the sidelines and starting their local football club’s first all-female team. Against the odds, they’ll stand united and overcome any challenge the club, the boys or the opposition can throw at them, all while wrestling with what it means to be a girl today.

trailers.title: EXCLUSIVE SNEAK PEEK! Goal-kicking new comedy drama Mustangs FC
